scripts.index: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.typesense ]; then set -a; . ./.env.typesense; set +a; fi; docker run -i -e TYPESENSE_API_KEY -e TYPESENSE_HOST -e TYPESENSE_PORT -e TYPESENSE_PROTOCOL -e "CONFIG=$(cat typesense-docsearch-config.json | jq -r tostring)" typesense/docsearch-scraper:0.12.0'
scripts.index:local: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.typesense ]; then set -a; . ./.env.typesense; set +a; fi; docker run -i --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --add-host=docs.topperpay.com:host-gateway -e TYPESENSE_API_KEY -e TYPESENSE_HOST -e TYPESENSE_PORT -e TYPESENSE_PROTOCOL -e "CONFIG=$(cat typesense-docsearch-config.local.json | jq -r tostring)" typesense/docsearch-scraper:0.12.0'
scripts.serve:index:local: TOPPER_DOCS_URL=http://docs.topperpay.com npm run build && sudo npm run serve -- --port 80
